summary: Backend (7/7 pytest) and Frontend (all critical flows) PASSED for Revanth Concrete Products MVP. Verified health, contact/quote/career CRUD, list endpoints (no _id leak), email skip behavior; verified all 8 page routes load, sticky navbar with glass effect on scroll, WhatsApp floating dialog (both numbers present in dialog and on home), Google Maps iframe inside contact-map, contact/quote/career form submissions show success indicators, products search & 16 category filters work (27 -> 1 on 'paver' search; filter[1] -> 2), and mobile menu toggle exposes 8 nav links.

minor.issue: email_configured=false because RESEND_API_KEY is empty (expected per problem statement). Submissions still persist and respond 200.

ui_bugs.issue: Document <title> is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of branded 'Revanth Concrete Products'. Update public/index.html title and meta description.

action_items: Update /app/frontend/public/index.html <title> and meta description to brand the site as 'Revanth Concrete Products | Maharudra Precast Pvt Ltd' (also good for SEO).
When client provides RESEND_API_KEY, set in /app/backend/.env and verify /api/health email_configured turns true; trigger a real notification.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context for FastAPI >=0.110.
ContactSubmission/QuoteSubmission/CareerSubmission share name/email/phone fields — extract a BasePerson model to DRY (~30 duplicate lines).
List endpoints fetch up to 500 items with no pagination; add limit/offset query params before scaling.
No rate limiting on public POST endpoints (/api/contact, /api/quote, /api/career) — risk of spam/abuse; add slowapi or hCaptcha.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — invalid CORS combo per browser spec; restrict origins for production.
seed_data_creation: Inserted TEST_-prefixed contact/quote/career rows via POST endpoints during pytest. Acceptable since no auth/admin UI exposes them publicly. Optional cleanup pending.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (pytest, 7 tests, all green). Public URL https://infra-build-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Email send is intentionally skipped while RESEND_API_KEY is empty. Key data-testids verified: site-navbar, whatsapp-floating, whatsapp-toggle-btn, whatsapp-number-0/1, contact-form, contact-submit, quote-form, quote-submit, career-form, career-submit, contact-map, products-search, products-filter-*, product-card-*, navbar-mobile-toggle, mobile-nav-link-*, tab-quote, tab-contact. Note: querying whatsapp-number-* immediately after toggle-btn click intermittently returns null due to framer-motion AnimatePresence enter delay — wait ~600ms after click before evaluating.
